BivLaplaceRL 0.1.0
  • Introduction
  • Reference
    • Introduction to BivLaplaceRL
  • Changelog

Package index

Parametric Distributions

Gumbel bivariate exponential, FGM, bivariate power, and Schur-constant distributions: density, CDF, survival function, and random generation.

dgumbel_biv() sgumbel_biv() pgumbel_biv() rgumbel_biv()
Gumbel Bivariate Exponential Distribution
pfgm_biv() dfgm_biv() sfgm_biv() rfgm_biv()
Farlie-Gumbel-Morgenstern (FGM) Bivariate Distribution
pbivpower() sbivpower() dbivpower() rbivpower()
Bivariate Power Distribution
sschur_biv() rschur_biv()
Schur-Constant Bivariate Distribution

Bivariate Laplace Transform of Residual Lives

Functions for computing and testing the bivariate Laplace transform of residual lives, including closed-form results for the Gumbel distribution, nonparametric estimation, and the NBUHR/NWUHR aging class test.

blt_residual()
Bivariate Laplace Transform of Residual Lives
blt_residual_gumbel()
Closed-Form Bivariate Laplace Transform of Residual Lives (Gumbel)
biv_hazard_gradient()
Bivariate Hazard Gradient
biv_mean_residual()
Bivariate Mean Residual Life Function
nbuhr_test()
Test NBUHR / NWUHR Aging Class
np_blt_residual()
Nonparametric Estimator for the Bivariate Laplace Transform of Residual Lives
sim_blt_residual()
Monte-Carlo Simulation Study for the BLT Residual Estimator

Bivariate Laplace Transform of Reversed Residual Lives

Functions for computing the bivariate Laplace transform of past (reversed) residual lives, the reversed hazard gradient, and the reversed MRL.

blt_reversed()
Bivariate Laplace Transform of Reversed Residual Lives
blt_reversed_fgm()
Closed-Form BLT of Reversed Residual Lives for the FGM Distribution
blt_reversed_power()
Bivariate Laplace Transform of Reversed Residual Lives — Power Distribution
biv_rhazard_gradient()
Bivariate Reversed Hazard Gradient
biv_rmrl()
Bivariate Reversed Mean Residual Life Function

Stochastic Ordering

Functions for checking bivariate stochastic orders: BLt-rl, BLt-Rrl, weak bivariate hazard rate, MRL, reversed hazard rate, and reversed MRL orders.

blt_order_residual()
Bivariate Laplace Transform Order of Residual Lives (BLt-rl)
blt_order_reversed()
Bivariate Laplace Transform Order of Reversed Residual Lives (BLt-Rrl)
biv_whr_order()
Weak Bivariate Hazard Rate Order
biv_wmrl_order()
Weak Bivariate Mean Residual Life Order
biv_brlmr_order()
Bivariate Relative Mean Residual Life Order
biv_wrhr_order()
Weak Bivariate Reversed Hazard Rate Order
biv_wrmrl_order()
Weak Bivariate Reversed Mean Residual Life Order

Entropy and Information Generating Functions

Shannon entropy, Golomb information generating function, residual entropy, and the residual entropy generating function (REGF) with nonparametric estimation.

shannon_entropy()
Shannon Differential Entropy
info_gen_function()
Golomb Information Generating Function
residual_entropy()
Residual Entropy Function
residual_info_gen()
Residual Entropy Generating Function (REGF)
regf_profile()
REGF Profile Over Alpha
regf_characterise()
Characterise a Distribution via the REGF
np_residual_info_gen()
Nonparametric Estimator for the Residual Entropy Generating Function
sim_regf()
Monte-Carlo Simulation for the REGF Nonparametric Estimator

Plotting Utilities

Ready-made plots for Laplace transforms and entropy measures.

plot_blt_residual()
Plot Bivariate Laplace Transform of Residual Lives
plot_blt_reversed()
Plot Bivariate Laplace Transform of Reversed Residual Lives
plot_regf()
Plot Residual Entropy Generating Function

Package

BivLaplaceRL-package BivLaplaceRL
BivLaplaceRL: Bivariate Laplace Transforms, Stochastic Orders, and Entropy Measures in Reliability

On this page

Developed by Mahesh Divakaran, S. Jayalekshmi, G. Rajesh, N. Unnikrishnan Nair, Smitha S..
